recipe_name: Wholesome Pumpkin Seeds & Apple (no seeds) Seed Chop
preparation_steps: Gently cook the grain (Oatmeal) and let it cool completely.
Wash and finely dice the fruits/vegetables (Apple (no seeds), Carrots, Broccoli).
Mix the diced fruit/vegetables with the cooked Oatmeal.
Stir in the fresh Pumpkin Seeds mix.
Serve in a clean feeding dish. Remove any uneaten soft food after 2-4 hours to prevent spoilage.
